meaning: n.[航海]风压差,偏航,风压角,可允许的误差,退路,<喻>落后,<口语>回旋余地
examples: How much leeway should parents give their children?
Rarely do schoolteachers have leeway to teach classes the way they want.
Now, I will allow some smaller positions some leeway to go through pullbacks and so on.
Commissioner, already gives the IRS some leeway to grant taxpayers relief when banks or brokers bungle.
